value.日期: ={{ new Date().getFullYear() + '/' + String(new Date().getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '/' + String(new Date().getDate()).padStart(2,'0') }}
={{ new Date().getFullYear() + '/' + String(new Date().getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '/' + String(new Date().getDate()).padStart(2,'0') }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ replyToken: $json.replyToken, messages: [{ type: 'flex', altText: $json.altText || $json.text, contents: $json.flexContents }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ replyToken: $json.replyToken, messages: [{ type: 'text', text: $json.text, quickReply: { items: $json.quickReplyItems } }] }) }}
